landing.heroSubtitle: The gamified learning platform for builders. Earn XP, collect on-chain credentials, and level up your Solana skills.
landing.onChainCredentialsDesc: Earn verifiable ZK compressed credentials on Solana. Your achievements live forever on-chain.
landing.gamifiedLearningDesc: Earn XP, maintain streaks, unlock achievements, and climb the leaderboard as you learn.
landing.handsonCodingDesc: Write and run Solana programs directly in the browser with our integrated code editor.
landing.communityDrivenDesc: Join thousands of developers building on Solana across Latin America and beyond.
landing.step1Desc: Sign in with your Solana wallet. Your progress is tied to your on-chain identity.
landing.step2Desc: Follow structured courses with hands-on coding challenges in a browser-based IDE.
landing.step3Desc: Complete courses to earn XP, level up, and receive verifiable on-chain credentials.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to start building on Solana?
landing.ctaDescription: Connect your wallet, choose a learning path, and earn verifiable on-chain credentials as you learn.
landing.featureHeadline: Learn it. Prove it. Own it forever.
landing.socialProofHeadline: Builders ship faster with Superteam Academy
landing.testimonial1: The hands-on challenges made Anchor click for me. Went from zero to deploying my first program in two weeks.
landing.testimonial2: On-chain credentials that actually prove your skills. This is what Web3 education should look like.
landing.testimonial3: The security track helped me audit my own protocol. Found two critical bugs before launch.
landing.anchorPathDesc: Build programs with the Anchor framework
landing.frontendPathDesc: Create dApp interfaces with React & Web3

courses.noResults: No courses found matching your filters.
courses.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search term to find courses.

lesson.courseCompleteDesc: You've completed all lessons in this course.
lesson.finalizeFailed: Could not finalize. Please try again.
lesson.syncFailed: Could not sync lesson progress. Please try again.
lesson.starterCodeHint: Use the provided starter code and fill in the TODO sections.
lesson.prerequisiteNotMet: You must complete the prerequisite course first.
lesson.hintStep1: Read the requirements and identify inputs/outputs.
lesson.hintStep2: Build the structure first, then handle edge cases.
lesson.hintStep3: Run tests frequently to check progress.
lesson.connectToFinalize: Connect a Solana wallet to finalize your course and claim your credential.

dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity. Start a course to begin!
dashboard.onChainCredentialsDesc: Complete career tracks to earn verifiable ZK compressed credentials on Solana.
dashboard.noRecommendations: Complete more courses to get personalized recommendations.
dashboard.noActivityHint: Complete lessons to see your activity here.
dashboard.demoBanner: Viewing demo data. Connect your wallet to track your real progress.

walletGate.label: SUPERTEAM ACADEMY
walletGate.heading: Dashboard
walletGate.subtext: Connect your wallet to unlock your learning progress, XP, and on-chain credentials.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.demoNotice: Showing demo leaderboard data. Real data appears as learners earn XP on-chain.
leaderboard.noLearnersDesc: Leaderboard data will appear as learners earn XP.
leaderboard.demoBanner: DEMO DATA · CONNECT WALLET FOR LIVE RANKINGS
leaderboard.snapshotUnavailable: TIME-FILTERED RANKINGS WILL BE AVAILABLE ONCE ENOUGH XP SNAPSHOT DATA IS COLLECTED. SHOWING ALL-TIME DATA.
leaderboard.buildersCount: {count} BUILDERS · RANKED BY ON-CHAIN XP · UPDATED LIVE
leaderboard.completeToAppear: Complete courses to appear on the leaderboard
leaderboard.connectForRank: Connect wallet to see your rank

profile.noCredentials: No credentials yet. Complete courses to earn on-chain credentials!
profile.noAchievements: No achievements unlocked yet. Keep learning!
profile.demoBanner: Viewing demo profile. Connect your wallet to see your real data.
profile.noCredentialsHint: Complete courses to earn verifiable on-chain credentials.
profile.noCoursesHint: Start learning to see your completed courses here.
profile.profileNotFoundDesc: This user doesn't exist or has a private profile.
profile.publicProfileBanner: You are viewing a public profile. Some information may be hidden based on the user's privacy settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.streakRemindersDesc: Daily reminders to maintain your streak
settings.publicProfileDesc: Allow others to view your profile, skills, and achievements
settings.showOnLeaderboardDesc: Display your name and rank on the public leaderboard
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your profile data, achievements, and credentials as JSON
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently remove your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. Your on-chain credentials will remain on Solana.
settings.darkModeNote: Dark mode is the platform default.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.

certificate.title: Certificate of Completion
certificate.demoNotice: Viewing demo certificate. Connect your wallet to see your real credentials.
certificate.shareText: I earned the {course} credential on Superteam Academy!

certificates.title: Credentials
certificates.subtitle: Verifiable on-chain certificates earned through learning
certificates.demoBannerDescription: Connect your Solana wallet to view your real on-chain credentials and certificates.
certificates.noCredentialsDescription: Complete courses to earn verifiable on-chain credentials as ZK compressed credentials on Solana.
certificates.onChainFooter: Credentials are fetched from on-chain enrollment data and Metaplex Core assets.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Get notified about new courses, features, and Solana ecosystem updates.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

offline.label: CONNECTION LOST
offline.heading: You're offline
offline.subtext: Check your internet connection and try again. Your progress is saved locally and will sync when you reconnect.

pwa.installText: Install Superteam Academy for a faster, offline-ready experience.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Take a quick assessment to discover your ideal learning path on Solana.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Answer 8 quick questions so we can gauge your experience level and recommend the right learning path. It takes less than 2 minutes.
onboarding.introStep1: 8 quick questions about your Solana experience
onboarding.introStep2: We figure out your skill level and preferred track
onboarding.introStep3: Get a personalized learning path built for you
onboarding.youScoredOutOf: You scored {score} out of {total} questions correctly
onboarding.recommendationExplanation: Based on your answers, we recommend starting with the {track} track at the {difficulty} level.
onboarding.orientationSubtitle: A quick look at the key areas of the platform before you dive in.
onboarding.coursesDesc: Browse tracks in Rust, DeFi, NFTs, and Frontend. Each course awards XP.
onboarding.dashboardDesc: Track XP, streaks, level progression, and earned credentials.
onboarding.leaderboardDesc: See how you rank against other builders. Climb with more XP.
onboarding.communityDesc: Ask questions, share knowledge, and connect with Solana devs.
onboarding.walletNote: Connect your wallet to earn on-chain XP and soulbound credentials
onboarding.tourCoursesDesc: Browse all available tracks — Rust, DeFi, NFTs, and Frontend. Each course earns you XP and credentials.
onboarding.tourDashboardDesc: Track your XP, streaks, level progression, and earned credentials. Your mission control.
onboarding.tourDashboardNote: all your stats at a glance
onboarding.tourLeaderboardDesc: See how you stack up against other builders. Climb the ranks as you earn more XP.
onboarding.tourCommunityDesc: Ask questions, share knowledge, and connect with other Solana developers.
onboarding.tourWalletDesc: Connect your Solana wallet to earn on-chain XP and soulbound credentials.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Platform administration and content management
admin.courseManagementDesc: Create, edit, and publish courses and lessons
admin.userManagementDesc: View learner profiles, XP history, and credentials
admin.accessDeniedDesc: Connect an admin wallet to access the dashboard.
admin.credentialIssuanceDesc: Mint and manage on-chain credentials (Metaplex Core)
admin.credentialIssuanceInfo: Credential issuance is handled automatically when learners finalize a course. View credential activity in the Analytics section.
admin.contentModerationDesc: Review community threads and manage reports
admin.cmsIntegrationDesc: Connect Sanity CMS for content management alongside Supabase
admin.platformSettingsDesc: Configure XP rates, season management, backend signer
admin.enterPassword: Enter the admin password to continue.
admin.createNewCourseDesc: Set up course metadata, then add modules and lessons
admin.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what learners will gain from this course...
admin.instructionsPlaceholder: Describe what the learner should implement...
admin.noModulesYet: No modules yet. Add a module to start building your course.
admin.cmsDescription: Connect your Sanity CMS to manage and import course content. Courses from both Supabase (database) and Sanity (CMS) will be available.
admin.cmsStep1Desc: (Supabase) are managed directly from this admin panel — edit titles, descriptions, modules, and lessons.
admin.cmsStep2Desc: (Sanity) let content creators use Sanity Studio to author rich course content with their familiar tools.
admin.cmsStep3Desc: The platform merges both sources — Supabase courses appear first, then Sanity courses, with static fallback data as a safety net.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Discuss courses, ask questions, and share your projects
community.description: Ask questions, share projects, and connect with fellow builders.
community.noThreads: No threads yet. Start a conversation!

cookieConsent.description: We use cookies for analytics to improve your experience.

errors.adminDescription: Something went wrong while loading the admin dashboard.
errors.coursesDescription: Something went wrong while loading the course catalog.
errors.certificatesDescription: Something went wrong while loading your certificates.

metadata.title: Superteam Academy | Master Solana Development
metadata.description: The gamified learning platform for Solana developers. Earn XP, collect on-chain credentials, and level up your skills.
metadata.coursesDescription: Browse Solana development courses. Learn Rust, Anchor, DeFi, and more with hands-on coding challenges.
metadata.dashboardDescription: Track your Solana learning progress, XP, streaks, and achievements on your personalized dashboard.
metadata.leaderboardDescription: See the top Solana developers ranked by XP. Compete with other learners and climb the leaderboard.
metadata.settingsDescription: Manage your Superteam Academy account settings, display preferences, and wallet configuration.
metadata.credentialsDescription: View your verifiable on-chain credentials. Certificates earned through Solana development courses.
metadata.profileDescription: View your Solana developer profile. Track skills, credentials, achievements, and learning activity.
